name: The Lottery Corporation Limited
analysis: TLC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.5600, stop A$5.1084, target A$6.9148 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
